Tests that calling `Number()` returns positive zero.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Number` function in JavaScript. It checks if calling `Number()` without any arguments returns `+0`, which is the expected result according to the ECMAScript specification. The use of `assert` ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is not met, indicating a deviation from the expected behavior. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific aspect of the `Number` function.
